title: phyllanthus turbinatus
intro: Phyllanthus turbinatus, also known as the Binjai tree or the rain tree, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is widely recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the replication of the hepatitis B virus, and its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus turbinatus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal medicine through various methods, including decoction, infusion, and capsule formulation, and is often used to treat liver and digestive disorders.
